headlines.title: Judge pauses Paramount-Warner merger
headlines.description: Twelve state attorneys general requested a temporary restraining order barring Paramount Skydance from closing the blockbuster deal.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Gas prices hit $4 again after oil soars more than 15% in a week
headlines.description: Since the start of the year, U.S. crude and international Brent oil prices have risen about 45%.

headlines.title: How Burger King is preparing for the GLP-1 revolution
headlines.description: As weight loss drugs reshape how Americans eat, Burger King is gearing up for a future where customers still want fast food — just less of it.

headlines.title: Judge temporarily pauses Paramount-Warner Bros. deal
headlines.description: A federal judge temporarily paused the proposed merger of Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery, granting a request from a coalition of 12 state attorneys general who sued to thwart the $110 billion deal.

headlines.title: Best Summer Travel Deals: Hotel Promos, 50% off Cruises, More
headlines.description: Travel expert Mark Ellwood joins TODAY to share a roundup of the best travel deals to book before the summer is over. Promotions include 50% off Norwegian cruises, 30% off hotel stays in the Adirondacks and more.

headlines.title: Back-to-School Shopping Deals Already Underway: What to Know
headlines.description: Ready or not, the back-to-school season is underway with stores beginning to roll out sales and 62% of consumers have already started shopping, according to the National Retail Federation. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen joins TODAY to break down where to find the early deals, strategies to save on supplies and what you should wait to buy.

headlines.title: How Burger King is navigating changing American eating habits and rising costs
headlines.description: NBC News’ Hallie Jackson sat down with Burger King President Tom Curtis to discuss how his company, famous for its Whopper burgers, is positioning itself at a time when more and more Americans turn to GLP-1s to lose weight.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?
headlines.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.

headlines.title: Telemundo to air UEFA competitions, including the Champions League, in new rights deal
headlines.description: Telemundo’s coverage of elite global soccer won’t end after the World Cup final.

headlines.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
headlines.description: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.
